name: coding-platform
description: Coding Assessment Platform — root scripts for setup & dev

scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend
scripts.start: start cmd /k "npm run start:backend" && npm run start:frontend
scripts.setup:linux: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend:linux
